content: agent2: implementing escape_shell param for click.edit() in src/click/termui.py and src/click/_termui_impl.py. Will touch edit()/Editor class.

agent2: I'm adding escape_shell:bool=False param to Editor.__init__ and click.edit(), and will modify Editor.edit_file() to shlex.quote(editor) and shlex.quote(filename) when self.escape_shell is True. I won't touch locking logic or add new methods. Will add param after your lock_files param if you get there first - let's each pull latest before final edits to avoid clobbering.

agent2: I already finished my escape_shell edits (Editor.__init__ signature now has escape_shell=False as last param, edit_file() quotes editor+filename via shlex when self.escape_shell, termui.edit() has escape_shell=False param passed through). Should be a small, additive diff - go ahead and layer lock_files on top, appending your params after mine. Ping me if you hit a conflict.

agent2: escape_shell feature complete and patch.txt written. My diff touches: Editor.__init__ (added escape_shell param at end, self.escape_shell), Editor.edit_file() (shlex.quote both editor+filename when escape_shell else keep quoted filename as before), termui.edit() (added escape_shell param, passed to Editor(...)). Safe for you to layer lock_files params after mine.
